tests.name: TaskDetailEmpty renders task name and description when task provided
TaskDetailEmpty renders placeholder text when task is null
TaskDetailEmpty renders default description when task has no description
TaskDetailEmpty calls onNavigateToSynthesis when button clicked
TaskDetailEmpty uses design system empty-state classes
useDragAndDrop initializes with null draggedId and dragOverId
useDragAndDrop sets draggedId on drag start
useDragAndDrop clears state on drag end
useDragAndDrop sets dragOverId on drag over different element
useDragAndDrop does not set dragOverId when dragging over same element
useDragAndDrop clears dragOverId on drag leave
useDragAndDrop reorders entries on drop
useDragAndDrop does not reorder when dropping on same element
useDragAndDrop handles setEntries callback correctly
useAudioPlayback initialization initializes with null states
useAudioPlayback handlePlayEntry does nothing for non-existent entry
useAudioPlayback handlePlayEntry synthesizes audio when no audioUrl or audioBlob
useAudioPlayback handlePlayAll does nothing with empty entries
useAudioPlayback handlePlayAll starts loading when called with entries
getVoiceModel logic uses efm_s for single word
getVoiceModel logic uses efm_l for multiple words
useAudioPlayback with existing audio plays entry with audioUrl directly
useAudioPlayback with existing audio plays entry with audioBlob
useAudioPlayback with existing audio ignores empty audioUrl and synthesizes instead
useAudioPlayback with existing audio stops playback when handlePlayAll called while playing
useAudioPlayback with existing audio handlePlayAll completes with audioUrl entries
useAudioPlayback with existing audio handlePlayAll with audioBlob entries completes successfully
useAudioPlayback with existing audio handlePlayAll with synthesis failure in playSingleEntry
useAudioPlayback with existing audio synthesizeAndPlay handles synthesis error
useAudioPlayback with existing audio ignores audioBlob with size 0 and synthesizes
useAudioPlayback with existing audio creates blob URL for audioBlob entries
useAudioPlayback with existing audio onended callback resets currentPlayingId to null
useAudioPlayback with existing audio handlePlayAll resets all states when called twice
useAudioPlayback with existing audio revokeObjectURL called for blob entry after playback
useAudioPlayback with existing audio handlePlayAll stops current audio when toggled off
useAudioPlayback with existing audio handlePlayAll transitions from loading to playing after first entry
useAudioPlayback with existing audio handlePlayEntry with audioUrl sets playing state
useAudioPlayback with existing audio handlePlayEntry with non-trimmed empty audioUrl synthesizes
TaskDetailLoading renders loading state with back button
TaskDetailLoading calls onBack when clicked
TaskDetailError renders error message with back button
TaskDetailError calls onBack when clicked
TaskDetailHeader rendering returns null when entriesCount is 0
TaskDetailHeader rendering renders task name and description
TaskDetailHeader rendering renders without description when null
TaskDetailHeader actions calls onShare when clicked
TaskDetailHeader actions calls onPlayAll when clicked
TaskDetailHeader actions shows loading state
TaskDetailHeader actions shows pause state
TaskDetailHeader menu open opens menu on click
TaskDetailHeader menu open shows menu items when open
TaskDetailHeader menu actions handles edit click
TaskDetailHeader menu actions handles delete click
TaskDetailHeader menu actions closes on backdrop click
